name: How fault determined in machine work injury third-party suit?
description: Comparative fault reduces by your % responsibility.

mainEntity.name: How fault determined in machine work injury third-party suit?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comparative fault reduces by your % responsibility.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Comparative negligence: jury apportions % fault, reduces your award.** Idaho bars if 50%+ yours[2]. Evidence like training, maintenance. Lawyer builds case.
